name: public_safety_water_allocation_model_mesa_lib_eq
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety water allocation model mesa lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Leila Haddad
agents.identity: I am Leila Haddad, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Marco Kim
agents.identity: I am Marco Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Leila Haddad must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Leila Haddad do?
